name: io.github.jonradoff/lastsaas
description: Read-only admin MCP server for LastSaaS SaaS platform — 26 tools for dashboards, users, tenants, financials, logs, health monitoring, and more.

environmentVariables.name: LASTSAAS_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the LastSaaS instance (e.g., https://your-app.fly.dev or http://localhost:4290)

environmentVariables.name: LASTSAAS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Root-tenant API key with admin authority (starts with lsk_). Create in Admin → API Keys.
